positive: Minimalist symmetrical illustration of a fantastical, wise owl perched on a stylized crescent moon, surrounded by geometric forest elements like abstract ferns and glowing glowing bioluminescent moss. The owl should have large, expressive eyes and a calm, serene posture. Use a deep indigo and teal color palette with pops of electric gold and silver for contrast. The style must be highly detailed, vector illustration, linocut effect, negative space focused, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Clean silhouettes, strong outlines, intricate pattern work, centered composition, cinematic lighting, high contrast, flat graphic design.
